title: Real Arrow Tip
description: bows now display the correct arrow
body:
# Real Arrow Tip

The time has ended where your bow simply shoots a different arrow than displayed!

![Multishot Spectral Arrow Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315ab38a8cb65be9c838582933318b5afa41ee3f.jpeg)

## Features

all arrows show their true selves

- Bow & Crossbow displays correct colored tip when shooting tipped arrows
- Bow & Crossbow displays spectral arrows
- Crossbow shows multishot
- Arrow entity displays colored tip when it's a tipped arrow


## Texturepacks supporting this mod

* [Bray's Better 3D Bow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brays-better-3d-bow)
